creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Requires root privileges for staging, this should be fixed:

===>  Staging for nickleby-2.2
===>   nickleby-2.2 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/x11.pc - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
/usr/bin/install -o root -g wheel -m555 -c -s nickleby /usr/local/ports/x11-wm/nickleby/work/stage//usr/local/bin
install: /usr/local/ports/x11-wm/nickleby/work/stage//usr/local/bin/nickleby: chown/chgrp: Operation not permitted
*** Error code 71
